title: tragopogon orientalis
intro: Tragopogon orientalis, also known as the salsify or Oriental salsify, is a biennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The root of the plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions like rheumatism and arthritis, and it is also believed to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels and improving digestion. The root can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
